  - Title: Vibrational Spectrum of Sodium Azide Crystals

- **Sample Description and Experimental Conditions**: 
  - The samples were sodium azide (NaN₃) crystals grown from commercial NaN₃ with high purity through repeated recrystallizations.
  - Transparent plates approximately 0.3 mm thick were obtained by
overall_findings:
he Page**: 
  - The vibrational modes of sodium azide crystals were analyzed, focusing on translational and rotational lattice modes.
  - Infrared vibrational species with symmetry about the azide ion axis were observed.
  - The study noted the importance of crystal orientation and thickness in obtaining reliable spectral data.

This summary captures the essential information from the page regarding the experimental setup and findings related to the vibrational spectrum of sodium azide crystals.
